body.default: All surfaces perform best when cared for correctly. Download our maintenance guides or speak to our team for personalised advice.

default.title: Solid Surface Maintenance Guide
default.body: Learn how to clean, maintain, and repair your solid surface. Minor scratches can be sanded out — extending the life of your surface indefinitely.

default.title: Quartz Surface Maintenance Guide
default.body: Quartz is low-maintenance by nature, but certain chemicals and extreme heat can cause damage. Our guide covers what to avoid and how to clean effectively.

default.title: Sintered Stone Care Tips
default.body: Sintered stone is virtually maintenance-free, but proper sealing and correct cleaning products ensure it stays pristine for decades.

default.title: Speak to Our Specialists
default.body: Not sure how to handle a specific issue? Our after-sales team is available to advise on maintenance, repairs, and restoration for any CO-TOP surface.
